about:
We're a student-run applied AI community focused on building real AI products. No prior experience required — our curriculum starts at absolute zero and builds to shipping production apps.

We meet weekly to work through hands-on workshops, host speaker events, and collaborate on projects. Whether you're writing your first line of code or deploying ML models, there's a place for you here.

events.title: AI Hackathon
events.description: 12-hour build sprint with prizes from our sponsors.

local_content.title: Fall 2025 Innovation Labs Recap
local_content.description: Project highlights and outcomes from our first Innovation Labs event.
